aa_dispersion.note: Per-board, per-class A/A paired-ratio CI half-widths, measured by `stwo-perf run --aa` on the designated Apple M5 Max judge host (arm64 macOS, 18 CPU cores, 2026-07-20) and recorded here. riscv stays null until its board enables; theta = max(floor, 2 x dispersion) per class.

epochs.reason: Metrics v2 opens the manifest-owned five-class native scoring universe; the epoch boundary prevents pre-xlarge history from diluting the new geomean

aa_dispersion.note: small/wide/deep retain their same-host M5 calibration; xlarge/huge remain null and therefore fail closed for judged promotion until measured on the designated judge host.
